message:
chore(artifacts): add gate verification run artifacts for 14 quality gates

Capture deterministic gate execution evidence from quality gate
pipeline runs. These artifacts provide audit trail and regression
baselines for the parser quality infrastructure.

Top-level gate artifacts (run manifests, event logs, commands):
- control_plane_invariants_dashboard (6 runs)
- deterministic_e2e_harness (4 runs)
- frx_primitive_adoption_schema (2 runs)
- observability_information_theoretic (1 run)
- parser_api_compatibility (4 runs)
- parser_benchmark_protocol (4 runs)
- parser_depth_partitioner (1 run)
- parser_diagnostics_quality_rubric (1 run)
- parser_event_materializer, parser_evidence_indexer,
  parser_failover_controls, parser_merge_witness,
  parser_multi_engine_harness, parser_oracle, parser_phase0,
  parser_phase0_gate, parser_phase1_arena,
  parser_phase1_arena_rollback, parser_reducer_promotion,
  parser_scheduler_transcript, parser_supremacy_criteria,
  parser_user_impact_baseline_dashboard, phase_a_exit_gate,
  simd_lexer_feature_gate, test262_es2020_gate

Test-level artifacts:
- benchmark_e2e: 24 benchmark run evidence bundles (summary +
  evidence JSONL + manifest per run)
- test262_release_gate: 12 collector evidence bundles (evidence
  JSONL + high-water-mark JSON + manifest per run)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
